title: IPOs and SPACs are Back, Mag 7 Showdown, Zuck on Tilt, Apple's Fumble, GENIUS Act passes Senate
description:
(0:00) The Besties welcome Thomas Laffont!

(3:26) State of LA, Hollywood's decline, positivity around GDP growth and AI productivity

(10:19) Zuck on tilt over AI: $100M offers, Scale AI deal, hiring spree

(23:58) Mag 7 AI Showdown: Ranking the most likely AI winners, biggest stock divergences, and more

(42:41) Why Apple is fumbling AI and how they can fix it?

(57:02) IPOs and M&A heating up in 2025

(1:16:18) State of liquidity: SPACs, Direct Listings, and more

(1:25:40) Amazon's "kingmaker" position, job displacement

(1:37:47) Sacks joins to discuss the GENIUS Act passing the Senate

(1:52:13) Animal trailer

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses the current state of LA, Hollywood's decline, and the growth of AI productivity. They also talk about Zuck's $100M offers, the Mag 7 AI Showdown, and Apple's fumbling of AI. The episode also covers the GENIUS Act passing the Senate and the state of liquidity in the market.

takeaways.text: Zuck is on tilt over AI
IPOs and M&A are heating up in 2025
SPACs and Direct Listings are gaining traction
The GENIUS Act has passed the Senate
Job displacement is a concern with AI

sentiment.notes: The hosts are excited about the growth of AI productivity and the potential for new technologies to emerge. However, they also express concern about job displacement and the impact of AI on certain industries.

notable_moments.description: Apple's fumbling of AI is discussed
The GENIUS Act passing the Senate is discussed
